LanguageData.MIL_GlobalWindows: Skin large windows with the Morrowind theme
LanguageData.MIL_ShowTradeMessages: Show pawn to pawn trade notices
LanguageData.MIL_SettingsBlurb: This version removes the road travel systems and focuses the entire mod on the Morrowind style inventory, stockpile like pawn inventories, trader roles, and automatic resource sharing.
